# localCV

> localCV is an open source, local-first, privacy-focused AI resume builder with cover letter generation, job application tracking, and Google Drive/GitHub backup.

Build ATS-ready resumes without signup or paywall. All resume and cover letter data stays local-first on the user's device (IndexedDB), with AI-assisted refinement for summaries, bullet points, and cover letters, and on-demand backup to the user's own Google Drive or GitHub.

## Pages

- [Home](https://localcv.tusharvashishth.com/): Marketing and product overview page — the canonical page for indexing.
- [Templates Gallery](https://localcv.tusharvashishth.com/resume-templates): Public gallery of ATS-friendly resume templates with realistic preview content; click a template to jump directly into builder customization.
- [Privacy Policy](https://localcv.tusharvashishth.com/privacy-policy): How localCV handles user data.
- [Terms of Service](https://localcv.tusharvashishth.com/terms-of-service): Terms for using localCV.

## Modules

- Resume Builder: Create and edit resumes from a local profile. Supports 8 templates (Classic, Modern, Minimal, Executive, Technical, Sidebar Color, With Photo, Creative). Export as PDF.
- ATS Scorer: Paste a job description alongside a resume for an ATS compatibility score and keyword gap analysis.
- Company Resumes: Generate and store tailored resume variants targeted at specific companies and roles, derived from the user's base profile.
- Cover Letter Builder: Generate AI-written cover letters tailored to a target company and job description. Supports 4 templates (Clean, Professional, Bold, Elegant) with customisable font, size, and colours. Export as PDF.
- Job Board (Job Tracker): Kanban/list board for tracking job applications through pipeline stages, linked to tailored resumes.
- Google Drive & GitHub Sync: On-demand backup/restore of local resume data to the user's own Drive/GitHub app-data folder — an optional, user-controlled backup, not continuous cloud sync.
- Progressive Web App: Installable on desktop and mobile, with a custom install prompt, splash screen, and a service-worker-backed app shell cache.

## Optional

- Private application surfaces such as `/dashboard/*` require a signed-in local session and hold user-specific data — do not crawl or index these routes.
- The `/api/*` path is server-only and should not be crawled.
- `/test` is an internal testing route — ignore it.

## Tech context

- Framework: Next.js (App Router), TypeScript
- UI: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- Storage: IndexedDB via Dexie
- AI: Mastra SDK with bring-your-own provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.)
- Validation: Zod
